title: Parabilis Sets Record $670M Biotech IPO
headline: Parabilis Medicines prices the largest-ever venture-backed biotech IPO at $670M, extending a historic 2026 IPO streak.
key_facts: Priced at $20/share, raising $670M (BioPharma Dive, June 10) Record for a venture-backed biotech company Funds earmarked for cancer drug development

title: TG Therapeutics Surges ~10–20% on Briumvi Pipeline Expansion
headline: TG Therapeutics (TGTX) stock surges on subcutaneous Briumvi data in myasthenia gravis plus Phase 3 ENHANCE data in MS.
key_facts: Stock up ~9.96–10.3% intraday; trading at $44.49–$47.09 (sources vary slightly — StocksToTrade cites $47.09, Benzinga and Investing.com cite ~10% move) Breakout from closes around $38–$40 in late May Trading ~20.5% above 20-day SMA ($39.86) and ~45.9% above 200-day SMA ($32.91) per Benzinga

title: Sanofi Stops Riliprubart Late-Stage Nerve Disease Trial
headline: Sanofi halts a late-stage study of riliprubart in nerve disease, adding to a series of R&D setbacks.
key_facts: Drug: riliprubart (immune/complement drug) Late-stage (implied Phase 3) trial in nerve disease stopped Sanofi will "mull riliprubart's future" per Endpoints News

title: AstraZeneca Obesity Pill — Phase 2 Data Anchors $5B Franchise Push
headline: AstraZeneca's oral GLP-1 pill elecoglipron showed 11.8% weight loss at 36 weeks in VISTA Phase 2, prompting an "extensive" late-stage program.
key_facts: Drug: elecoglipron (oral small-molecule GLP-1 receptor agonist) VISTA Phase 2: 11.8% weight loss at 36 weeks AZ planning a "sprawling late-stage program" based on these results

title: Novartis-Orionis Second Molecular Glue Deal
headline: Novartis and Orionis Biosciences strike a second molecular glue partnership for $40M upfront.
key_facts: $40M upfront payment Second deal between Novartis and Orionis Molecular glue degrader technology

title: Beren Therapeutics Raises $300M at FDA's Doorstep
headline: Beren Therapeutics secures $300M in new financing as it approaches an FDA decision.
key_facts: $300M in new financings Company described as "now at FDA's doorstep"
